title: Digital Transformation
content: ![MIT Sloan Management Review Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E) ## Latest [![](https://sloanreview.mit.edu/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Elliot-1290x860-1-382x255.jpg)](https://sloanreview.mit.edu/article/an-ai-reckoning-for-hr-transform-or-fade-away/) #### [Talent Management](https://sloanreview.mit.edu/topic/talent-management/) ### [An AI Reckoning for HR: Transform or Fade Away](https://sloanreview.mit.edu/article/an-ai-reckoning-for-hr-transform-or-fade-away/) HR professionals who don’t evolve into strategic leaders risk being displaced by AI-enabled tools.
